holdings.infoBox: AIA is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 21.52%, Samsung Electronics at 17.82%, SK hynix at 8.13%, Tencent Holdings at 4.92%, and MediaTek at 4.24%.

overview.description: The iShares Asia 50 ETF (AIA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Asia 50 Capped TR index. The fund tracks an index of 50 of the largest companies from Hong Kong, South Korea, Singapore and Taiwan. AIA was launched on Nov 13, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Airline stocks in Asia take a hit amid growing coronavirus fears in China
data.text: Travel-related shares in Asia fell Tuesday as fears grew over an outbreak of a mysterious virus in China that has killed four people so far.

data.title: 3 Charts That Suggest  Markets in Asia Are Headed Higher
data.text: Traders have recently focused attention within North America, but these charts suggest that it's time to increase international exposure.
